item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
up and at them
i try to avoid shows that have openers unless they are also a favorite
fun movie
dang
don't fuck with business cat
i knew it
yes
eating a bagel would be too crazy for me
he's a serial kiler
already knew both facts. any more brain busters?
we all know what it's for
as is tradition
but really friends, don't try to get your pet high
the shirt is about 100x less offensive than the jeans
(it was me. i did it)
mmm hmm
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: 62,500 stitches later...
item.dc:creator: doggetofftheqcekmty

item.title: I Stole This Dump, So You Don't Have To. Tuesday RANDOM memes of pure chaos!
item.description:
1. Now... is she genuine or did she saw a chance and took it?
2. I love that she still posted the video :D
3. His God is the God of Dancing
4
5. Speaking of Gods of Dancing
6. I've always wondered how much money does the Joker have
7. Bro, that was not a bad aim, to be fair
8. This bike comes with some nice handles
9
10. Xerxes's spirit animal! (He once had his army flog the sea)
11. When you're not quite sure if you're into a new fetish
12. Stuffed capybara to save the day
13. Unexpected
14. Gracious dog tax
15. And finally, I would like to show you the latest addition to my Stanley Parable-inspired game. It's book cover meant to be a subtle jab at certain company, that I've hidden somewhere in the game. Do you like the addition? If you like the humor of this dump, I'm sure the game will be to your liking. Please consider wishlisting it, as it is the best way to support small indie devs, like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I made a portrait of Carl Sagan out of wood. I hope you like it.
item.dc:creator: markhizio

item.title: AM. SCREAMING.
item.description: I can't even describe how upset I am. Instead of giving way to the possibility that IDK- global warming for instance- MAY BE CONTRIBUTING to these historic events, my mom's eyes lit up and she asked if I thought it was the chemicals the government is spraying in the clouds. WTF are you even talking about?! Get the hell off tik-tok! Don't even get me started about FEMA misinformation, because I'm literally applying and going thru the process right now. All the crap she's regurgitating is a huge insult.
item.dc:creator: bloodyconstipatednippledrip

item.title: Conservatives came from the belief that we were wrong to end the monarchy. It should come as no surprise they want to return us to one.
item.description: Source: https://youtu.be/8CNOS0v8v5c?si
item.dc:creator: aModestProposalAndOtherRecipies

item.title: Let's do this!
item.description:
I'm just saying, if we get together and do the rich person thing, then we don't have to pay taxes and we...
I mean... We could trick 1 bank into starting the cycle, right? Think about it, working together, we could come to occupy a significant portion of a credit union's ownership (or start our own) and we loan out money to buy bonds to use to loan out money.
I'm just saying, if it's just a matter of juggling stocks and loans to buy more stocks to use as collateral to get more loans... I mean, we could do that, right?
I bet we could.
I bet five of us could get it started. And, we make one of them a millionaire and that millionaire helps the others become millionaires...
I like fisherman's friend cough drops even though they have licorice
Or... Five of you. I admit I don't really understand it. But I know there are some really smart people on here. And people who try weird things.
If you want to be a millionaire, talk to people in the comments. Or don't, I'm not a cop (shrug)
item.dc:creator: BenArowndaBlok

item.title: Yeah... I didn't need to know the last part. Also ziptie companies hate this guy
item.dc:creator: SocialKeked

item.title: I sewed this! All 384 handmade flowers, hand embroidery, and both the under- and over-dresses!
item.description:
The final dress is almost an art piece to me. It took so long to create, having worked on it off and on for 6 months, losing track of the hours I poured into it. The underdress is cotton voile, fully lined in the same fabric. The overdress is polyester voile (as are all the flowers). I used chain stitch for the vines. All the flowers have beads at the center, are 6 petals each, and were sewn on individually.
You can see the two gold trimmed hems of the underdress somewhat here.
Close up of the flowers! So. Much. Time!
item.dc:creator: jenniesuesews

item.title: To make sure your home doesn't survive a hurricane, just park a Tesla in the garage and wait for the storm surge. Leon Husk will do the rest.
item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: Memes Acquired by Illegitimate Means #5

Gaddafi travelled literally everywhere with his Bedouin tent
Are you really a gamer if your dining room doesn't look like this?
Understandable.

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.106 STRANGE FRISK
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Serge Birault
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Michal Menert YouTube: https://youtu.be/sbcd5KJYPq0?si=FyGOH0tuAQ7Mg8hI Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/21jkY5fWnZ4vijitoSPcIn?si=36c93e4eddb04317
Rebeca Puebla
Mike Mignola
Joanna Karpowicz
Butcher Billy
Brian Valeza
Artem Chebokha
Kyoung Hwan Kim
Tony Sart
Tyler Imaikalani
Joao Bragato
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos
